description: Coral material items that drop as loot and reference coral properties.

items.name: Red Coral Branch
items.description: Vibrant red coral harvested from shallow reefs.

items.name: Black Coral Fragment
items.description: Dark coral from the ocean depths, prized for its rarity.

items.name: Brain Coral Piece
items.description: Intricate coral formation resembling brain tissue.

items.name: Fire Coral Shard
items.description: Stinging coral that burns to the touch, magically preserved.

items.name: Deep Sea Coral
items.description: Ancient coral from the darkest depths, imbued with primordial magic.
